meta.title: Prompt Flux — Prompt Optimization Middleware | ohara.systems
meta.description: Intelligent API middleware that automatically optimizes prompts and enforces configurable guardrails via self-hosted LLMs.

home.description: A prompt optimization engine as API middleware — automatically improves prompts and enforces configurable guardrails.

overview.description: Intelligent API middleware that automatically improves prompts and enforces configurable guardrails via self-hosted LLMs.

hero.description: Intelligent API middleware that sits between your app and the LLM. Prompt Flux analyzes incoming prompts in real-time, optimizes them automatically, and enforces configurable guardrails — all via self-hosted models.

features.title: Automatic Prompt Optimization
features.description: Prompts are analyzed and improved in real-time — context is added, ambiguities resolved, structure optimized.

features.title: Configurable Guardrails
features.description: Content filters, security and compliance rules — enforced via self-hosted LLMs. No external dependencies.

features.title: OpenAI-Compatible API
features.description: Drop-in middleware: just swap the base URL. Works instantly with any OpenAI-compatible client.

features.title: Multi-Model Support
features.description: GPT, Claude, Mistral, Llama, and all other models — Prompt Flux optimizes for any backend.
